d#d$
d%d&
d'd(
d)d*
d+d,

d/d0
d1d2
d7d8d9
installz'install everything from build directory)
prefix=Nz
installation prefix)
exec-prefix=Nz.(Unix only) prefix for platform-specific files)
home=Nz+(Unix only) home directory to install under)
install-base=Nz;base installation directory (instead of --prefix or --home))
install-platbase=Nz\base installation directory for platform-specific files (instead of --exec-prefix or --home))
root=Nz<install everything relative to this alternate root directory)
install-purelib=Nz;installation directory for pure Python module distributions)
install-platlib=Nz8installation directory for non-pure module distributions)
install-lib=Nzginstallation directory for all module distributions (overrides --install-purelib and --install-platlib))
install-headers=Nz(installation directory for C/C++ headers)
install-scripts=Nz)installation directory for Python scripts)
install-data=Nz%installation directory for data files)
compile
compile .py to .pyc [default])
no-compileNz
don't compile .py files)
z	optimize=
Ozlalso compile with optimization: -O1 for "python -O", -O2 for "python -OO", and -O0 to disable [default: -O0])
force
fz1force installation (overwrite any existing files))
skip-buildNz2skip rebuilding everything (for testing/debugging))
record=Nz3filename in which to record list of installed files)
userNz!install in user site-package '%s'r
